name: Synup Social vs. Hootsuite
hero_summary: Winning the social media game comes down to one thing: engaging your audience with great, relevant content. While Hootsuite provides rudimentary scheduling and analytics, it doesn’t pull its weight when it comes to content creation and optimization. Switch from Hootsuite, and start using a platform that works for you - generating posts using AI, researching trends, creating reports, and more. When it comes to Hootsuite vs Synup Social, the choice is obvious. With a platform that offers more features at a competitive price, it’s no surprise that customers are happier after they switch to Synup Social!

counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Make your team more productive and inspired
section_2_summary: From crossing wires with your team to wasting marketing dollars on an imperfect tool, Hootsuite gives your team more trouble than it’s worth! With an intuitive interface, Synup Social’s AI-powered content creation and scheduling features empower your team to keep up with new content and drive engagement across channels and locations. Synup Social makes your team more motivated, productive, and inspired. Here’s why Synup Social is the right tool for you:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Unique post ideas & AI-powered content creation
section_2_slider_1_summary: Post creation is our specialty. Revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. Inspire your team with ideas that will drive engagement and delight your audience. Say goodbye to writers’ block!
section_2_slider_2_summary: We make it easy to collaborate with your team and your clients - at no extra cost. Manage your posts with collaborative content creation and approval workflows. Plus, you can share white-labeled analytics and content calendars with clients. Get feedback directly on the platform, so you can create and revise with ease.
section_2_step_3_summary: Hootsuite doesn’t help your team when it comes to content creation and strategy. Synup Social gives you recommendations and insights that will change the game, from the best time to post to post-by-post analytics, so you can nail it every time.
section_2_slider_4_summary: While Hootsuite doesn’t support multi-location business posting, Synup Social allows you to schedule posts for multiple locations or brands simultaneously, making it perfect for agencies and large brands alike. With one account, you can manage all your profiles in one place!
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over Hootsuite?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: Synup Social saves you time and money by inspiring your team and building better workflows. From post-creation and trend research to analytics, Synup Social is the perfect choice for small businesses and large enterprises alike. And with multi-brand support, it’s great for agencies, too. With advanced features like a collaborative approval workflow and shareable, white-labeled analytics and post calendars, Synup Social is the invaluable tool your team needs to succeed.
